# WaifuAI

> Free open-source AI companion with Live2D animations, voice synthesis, memory, and custom personas.

## Main Projects

- [Waifu Companion](https://github.com/waifuai/waifu-companion) — Browser-based AI companion with Live2D character rendering, LLM-powered conversation via OpenRouter, trait-based personality customization, and interactive visual expression system.
- [Waifu Sprites](https://github.com/waifuai/waifu-sprites) — Animated desktop companion sprites for Hermes Agent with multi-pet support.
- [Hermes Waifu](https://github.com/waifuai/hermes-waifu) — Live2D display widget for Hermes Agent with 5 built-in models and drag/resize controls.
- [LLMs Full TXT](https://github.com/waifuai/llms-full-txt) — Generates llms-full.txt files aggregating documentation and source code into AI-optimized Markdown.

## Try It

- Web App: https://waifuai.com/app
- Download: https://waifuai.itch.io/waifu
- GitHub: https://github.com/waifuai

## Links

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@thewaifuai
- Twitter: https://x.com/thewaifuai
